/usr/bin/f95  -pthread -O3  -g -march=native -ffree-line-length-none -fbacktrace -cpp -DMPI -O3 -fno-stack-arrays -g -Wall -fcheck=all -fbacktrace -cpp -DMPI -ffpe-trap=invalid,zero,overflow CMakeFiles/postpro_app.dir/src/outputnew.f90.o  -o ../bin/postpro_app  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zhangxiangyu/.local/OpenBLAS/lib:/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib libcore_mods.a /home/zhangxiangyu/.local/OpenBLAS/lib/libopenblas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_usempif08.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_usempi_ignore_tkr.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_mpifh.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so
